pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit javax.validation dependency to resolve potential classpath issues during migration.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing HTTP services in tests.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to use TCP for event transmission to fix test execution issues.
Configure Maven JAR plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Configure JaCoCo plugin with specific exclusions and coverage rules for code quality checks.
Configure Pitest plugin for mutation testing with specific target classes and exclusions.
Add a new Maven profile for running with WireMock enabled.
Add a new Maven profile for integration testing with frontend build steps.
Update the Node.js version in the production profile from v12.12.0 to v16.20.0 for better compatibility.
Add frontend build steps to the production profile to ensure static assets are generated.
Rename the artifact ID and group ID to reflect the new project structure.
Add various project properties for main class, package paths, and target classes.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven build step to compile and package the application within the Docker image.
Define the specific Java command to run the packaged JAR file instead of a generic bash shell.
Copy source code and configuration files into the image to enable the build step.

README.md.human_impl: Replaced entire README.md content with new template structure

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect the new project identity.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default with TypeScript type annotation.
Update story file glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs extensions and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, Chromatic integration, and interactions.
Explicitly define the Storybook framework to use react-webpack5.
Configure static directories to serve public assets in Storybook.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or deprecation in newer Storybook/Webpack versions.

Added import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Added imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Added import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Initialized Mock Service Worker with dynamic URL logic to support both localhost and GitHub Pages environments.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Added `initialize({ serviceWorker: { url: mockServiceWorkerUrl } })` with logic to detect localhost vs remote host.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Added mswLoader to the preview configuration to ensure MSW is active for all stories.
